description: Feature: These bucket hats are designed in solid color and with brim design, which can not only provide you from harmful sun rays, but also add more highlights to your outfit, holding both decorative and practical functions. Our beach bucket hat for men and women is foldable and packable, easy to store and take with you when traveling or outdoors. Specification: Colors: White/Black Material: polyester cotton Product size: hat circumference: 56-60cm/22-23.62inch Product Use Function: Suitable for daily use and outdoor activities, such as walking, fishing, camping, hiking, gardening and hunting. Enjoy the outdoors in comfort and style. Package Includes: 1pcs Bucket Hat
